title: Kaufik´s Horror
description: Horror modpack for anyone who wants to enjoy horror and adventure
body: Embark on a chilling journey into the terrifying depths of Minecraft with the "Kaufik horror". This modpack brings a spooky atmosphere full of terrifying entities that will send chills down your spine. Get ready to build abysses against monsters from mods like The Man From The Fog, Cave Dweller. Modpack also brings performance improvements and adds biomes and animals from the real world.
